welcome.subject: Your community {name} is ready
welcome.title: Welcome to Project NEXUS
welcome.preview: Your community {name} is ready to launch
welcome.body: Great news — your community {name} has been provisioned and is ready for you to set up. Use the credentials below to log in for the first time.
welcome.next_steps: First steps: change your temporary password, invite your coordinators, customise your community branding, and review the default settings under Admin → Settings.

rejection.subject: Update on your Project NEXUS application
rejection.title: Application update
rejection.preview: An update on your community application
rejection.body: Thank you for your interest in setting up {org} on Project NEXUS. After review, we are unable to proceed with provisioning at this time.
rejection.followup: If you would like to discuss this further or re-apply with a different scope, please reply to this email and our team will be in touch.
